channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Your next work PC could be about to get a major performance boost as Kioxia reveals its most powerful SSD, with PCIe 5.0 and read speeds of up to 14,000 MB/s
item.description: Kioxia unveils PCIe 5.0 XG10 SSD series, delivering faster speeds for AI workstations, creators, gaming systems, and professionals.

item.title: Terraria developer confirms cross-play is coming and teases 15th anniversary collector's items
item.description: The game has sold 70 million copies over its 15-year run, Re-Logic said.

item.title: Fisker en faillite : 4 000 propriétaires montent leur propre constructeur open source pour sauver leurs SUV Ocean
item.description: Près de deux ans après le dépôt de bilan de Fisker, 4 000 propriétaires du SUV Ocean ont monté leur propre quasi-constructeur. À coups de rétro-ingénierie, de GitHub et de pièces détachées achetées en gros.

item.title: Proton 11 : le gaming sous Linux vient enfin de devenir… du gaming
item.description: Proton 11 fait sauter le dernier verrou entre Linux et le catalogue Steam : avec Wine 11 sous le capot et DXVK 2.7, jouer sous Linux ressemble enfin à… jouer.

item.title: Revamped Siri will reportedly offer auto-deleting chats
item.description: Apple is hoping that its record on privacy can be the differentiator on the AI front, and maybe even buy it a little slack as it continues to lag behind the competition. According to Bloomberg's Mark Gurman, the more chatbot-like Siri set to debut in iOS 27 will include the option to autodelete chat histories. […]

item.title: L’Europe pourrait prendre de vitesse les grandes puissances avec cette technologie spatiale inédite (interview)
item.description: L'orbite basse est devenue un enjeu de souveraineté. Satellites militaires, systèmes de communication critiques, capacités de renseignement : l'espace concentre désormais des intérêts stratégiques que les grandes puissances entendent défendre, y compris par la force. Face à la montée en...

item.title: J’ai testé le Wahoo Elemnt Roam 3 : a-t-il les qualités pour détrôner Garmin ?
item.description: Sur le marché des compteurs pour vélo, Garmin occupe une position de leader. Cependant, d'autres concurrents arrivent avec des produits plutôt pertinents comme Wahoo. J'ai récemment pu essayer le Wahoo Elemnt Roam, qui pourrait tenir tête au Garmin 850.

item.title: Architectural patterns for graph-enhanced RAG: Moving beyond vector search in production
item.description: Retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) has become the de facto standard for grounding large language models (LLMs) in private data. The standard architecture — chunking documents, embedding them into a vector database, and retrieving top-k results via cosine similarity — is effective for unstructured semantic search.However, for enterprise domains characterized by highly interconnected data (supply chain, financial compliance, fraud detection), vector-only RAG often fails. It captures similarity but misses structure. It struggles with multi-hop reasoning questions like, "How will the delay in Co...

item.title: 1047 Games' spiritual successor to Titanfall will reportedly be called Empulse
item.description: The rumored movement shooter is still in pre-alpha and without a release date.

item.title: University of Arizona students boo Eric Schmidt’s AI cheerleading during commencement
item.description: Former Google CEO Eric Schmidt delivered the commencement address at the University of Arizona on Friday. And, as his speech veered into talk of AI, he was repeatedly drowned out by boos. AI is already a contentious topic, and it's not surprising that those about to enter a ravaged job market feel particularly negative about […]

item.title: One of the top Thunderbolt storage firms has unveiled a new 80Gbps Pro offering — and it's perfect for AI developers and 8K video
item.description: Acasis FlowCore Series introduces Thunderbolt 5 storage claiming independent bandwidth per drive for high-performance multi-bay AI and media workflows.
